case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $637.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $637.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF ANTOINE HUNTER CONTINUED FROM MAY-05-2010 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-09-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. HEARING HELD. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: MATTER CONTINUED TO JUNE 9, 2010, 9:30 TO ALLOW CLAIMANT TIME TO RESPOND TO PETITIONER'S MOTION. (THE CLERK NOTIFIES D.A. TELEPHONICALLY OF THE NEW DATE.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489
